name: accessAudit
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler. Dispatch key 'security.accessAudit'. STATE-backed posture audit over the user's assets+vulns (like security-dashboard). Drives the page Access Audit result card (postureScore/rating/assetCount/openCritical/recommendations[]). postureScore = max(0, 100 - openCritical*20 - openHigh*8 - medium*2). Fail-soft {ok:false, error:'STATE unavailable'} with no STATE (assassin runs without a real STATE so 'ok' is not asserted). Pinned by server/tests/security-lens-macros.test.js.
